textByHash.31c7059e303e10e8d2648f81c71be579a6755bbf: Ha ha! Me knew me guess right!
textByHash.71b5a02e637f79a84003d1b48583d5e93cd85758: Me hear Dorgesh tribe return from below ground.
textByHash.7ac21d8847944746df12190324ce3bb26f636bc9: No, we say Dorgesh-goblin go in. You human, you go away!
textByHash.ca60c60ad59aa9c290009aaf3c3ad2958965abdd: Only goblins allowed in. If you goblin, you come in. But you not goblin, you stupid stinky puny human.
